classes.reasoning: This document is explicitly titled 'MONITORING VISIT REPORT' documenting a routine monitoring visit (RMV #3) to a clinical trial site. It contains site monitoring activities including subject status review, source data verification, IMP accountability, regulatory document checks, and action items—all typical eTMF monitoring documentation that does not fit more specific CSP/ICF/CRF/IB/CSR categories.

summary: This is a routine monitoring visit report (RMV #3) for trial BIORCE-ONC-2023-001 documenting the CRA's visit to Hospital Universitario La Paz (Site ES-02) in Madrid, Spain on 14 December 2023. The report covers status of 9 enrolled patients, source data verification findings with discrepancies and queries, IMP accountability reconciliation, regulatory document review including Protocol v2.1 Amendment 2 and ICF v3.0, and five follow-up action items including an expired CV and open laboratory queries.
references_to: Local EC Amendment 2 approval dated 02 Dec 2023
